title: • Integration: Graduation Pipeline, Recursive Feedback
content:
• Integration: Graduation Pipeline, Recursive Feedback
• Provides preservation options:
• Export via chatgpt-exporter
• Create cognitive-os-master-plan
• Link issues across repos
• Org-level discussion archive
• Recommends hybrid preservation approach.
• Gives immediate next steps and metadata template for all future planning sessions.

⸻

IX. Master Plan Creation Layer

16. 13prompt – Approve creation of master plan
• User authorizes master plan creation.

17. 13response – Awaiting approval
• Confirms readiness to trigger creation.
• Declares it will become permanent source of truth.

⸻

X. Master Plan Finalization Layer

18. 14prompt – Implicit approval
• Continuation trigger.

19. 14response – Confirms master plan repository structure
• Details full directory tree for cognitive-os-master-plan.
